item.description:
Valid element types are:
• samples
• equipment
• code
• compound
• reaction
• text
• steps
• excel
• plate

name.description: Specifies the name of the element. If not provided, the element will be assigned a default name

container_id.description: The ID of the section to which the element will be added

container_type.description: The type of container in which the element will be placed

element_type.description: The type of element to be added
